name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI-powered pair programmer providing real-time code suggestions powered by OpenAI.

name: GitLens
description: Supercharges Git within VS Code with Git blame annotations and interactive rebasing.

name: Prettier
description: An opinionated code formatter that enforces consistent code style across JavaScript, TypeScript, CSS, HTML, JSON, and Markdown.

name: Live Server
description: Launch a development local server with live reload feature for static & dynamic pages.

name: Auto Close Tag
description: Automatically adds HTML/XML closing tags when you type in the closing bracket of the opening tag.

name: Error Lens
description: Highlights errors, warnings, and other language diagnostics prominently with inline messages.

name: Code Spell Checker
description: Detects and corrects spelling errors in your codebase with misspelled words highlighted with squiggly underlines.

name: Live Share
description: Enables real-time collaborative development allowing multiple developers to share code and edit simultaneously.

name: Git History
description: Explore detailed Git repository history with visual commit logs, file history, and comparisons directly in VS Code.

name: Codeium
description: Free AI code assistant providing context-aware code completion and chat across 70+ programming languages.

name: Tabnine
description: Free AI assistant providing context-aware code completion suggestions for JavaScript, Python, TypeScript, and more.

name: ESLint
description: Integrates ESLint into VS Code to identify unused variables, incorrect patterns, and potential bugs.

name: Python
description: Provides language support for Python including IntelliSense, debugging, linting, formatting, and unit testing.

name: Thunder Client
description: Lightweight REST API client for testing APIs with collections, environment variables, and GraphQL support.

name: REST Client
description: Send HTTP requests from plain text files and view formatted responses inline with environment support.

name: Docker
description: Build, manage, and debug containerized applications directly from VS Code with Docker support.

name: Dev Containers
description: Open any folder or repository inside a Docker container and use VS Code with full feature set.

name: Kubernetes
description: Comprehensive Kubernetes tools for viewing clusters, deploying applications, and debugging pods.

name: Todo Tree
description: Displays TODO, FIXME, and other comment tags in a searchable tree view for better organization.

name: Peacock
description: Subtly changes your workspace color to quickly identify which VS Code instance you're working on.

name: Indent Rainbow
description: Colors each indentation level differently for improved code structure visibility and readability.

name: Path Intellisense
description: Autocompletes file paths and directory names intelligently as you type.

name: Better Comments
description: Categorizes and styles code annotations (alerts, queries, highlights) for improved readability.

name: WakaTime
description: Tracks time spent coding with metrics, insights, and programming activity analytics displayed in status bar.

name: CodeSnap
description: Captures styled screenshots of code snippets for easy sharing and presentations.

name: Project Manager
description: Organize and manage multiple projects with tagging and quick switching capabilities.

name: Bookmarks
description: Marks important code locations with blue bookmark icons for quick navigation and code organization.

name: IdeaVim
description: A Vim engine for JetBrains IDEs that brings Vim keybindings and functionality to your IDE.

name: Material Theme UI
description: A comprehensive theme plugin with professional UI designs and customization options for JetBrains IDEs.

name: Rainbow Brackets
description: Enhances code readability by assigning different colors to brackets at varying levels.

name: Key Promoter X
description: Helps you learn IDE keyboard shortcuts by displaying the corresponding shortcut whenever you use the mouse.

name: GitToolBox
description: A productivity and collaboration tool that expands built-in Git integration with inline blame annotations.

name: JetBrains AI Assistant
description: An official JetBrains intelligent coding assistant offering context-aware AI chat and code suggestions.

name: CodeGlance
description: Adds a code minimap to the editor pane similar to Sublime Text for quick navigation of code.

name: SonarQube for IDE
description: A sophisticated static analysis tool that detects coding issues and security vulnerabilities in real-time.

name: Lombok
description: Adds first-class support for Project Lombok, reducing boilerplate code by auto-generating getters and setters.

name: CheckStyle-IDEA
description: Provides real-time and on-demand scanning of Java files with CheckStyle to enforce coding standards.

name: Apidog Fast Request
description: A free API debugging plugin that automatically detects endpoints and allows sending HTTP requests within IntelliJ IDEA.

name: String Manipulation
description: Offers comprehensive string manipulation features including case switching, sorting, and filtering.

name: Database Navigator
description: A database development and management tool that extends IDE capabilities with practical database operations.

name: BashSupport Pro
description: Advanced Bash, Zsh, and POSIX shell script support with auto-completion and visual debugging.

name: Prettier for JetBrains
description: Integrates Prettier code formatter into JetBrains IDEs for automatic code formatting.

name: Blueprint Assist

name: Quixel Bridge (Megascans)

name: Oceanology

name: Ultra Dynamic Sky
description: Comprehensive sky and weather system with dynamic day-night cycles and atmospheric effects.

name: Dungeon Architect
description: Procedural level generation plugin with node-based systems for designing dungeons and complex spaces.

description: Adobe's material creation plugin enabling use of parametric Substance materials in UE5.

name: Datasmith
description: Workflow tool for importing CAD and design data from 20+ sources into UE5.

name: Niagara Particle System
description: Visual effects engine for creating real-time particle simulations and environmental effects.

name: Common UI Plugin
description: Epic's built-in UI framework providing advanced multiplatform user interface components.

name: Sequencer Cinematic Editor

description: DevTools extension for debugging and inspecting React components, props, and state in real-time.

name: Redux DevTools

name: Vue.js DevTools

name: CSS Peeper

name: Wappalyzer

name: Lighthouse
description: Google's automated auditing tool for performance, accessibility, SEO, and best practices.

name: JSON Crack Formatter

name: Dark Reader
description: Applies configurable dark theme to websites with brightness and contrast adjustments.

name: WhatFont
description: Easily identify fonts used on webpages with detailed info including family, size, and weight.

name: VisBug
description: Point-and-click web design debugger with color picker, ruler, and CSS code export.

name: Requestly
description: HTTP interceptor for modifying requests/responses, mocking APIs, and redirecting URLs.

name: Octotree
description: GitHub code tree sidebar for IDE-like navigation, bookmarks, and code review.

name: ColorZilla
description: Advanced color picker, eyedropper, CSS gradient generator, and color analyzer for designers.

name: uBlock Origin Lite
description: Efficient content blocker that removes ads and malicious scripts.

name: Fake Filler
description: Auto-fills form inputs with randomly generated dummy data for rapid testing.

name: Web Developer
description: Toolbar with essential web development tools for inspecting HTML/CSS and debugging.

name: WAVE Evaluation Tool

description: AI pair programmer providing real-time code suggestions powered by OpenAI.

name: Sourcegraph Cody
